About Summit Home Theater

12+ years serving Austin and surrounding areas

Founded in 2012, Summit Home Theater began with a simple mission: bring premium audiovisual experiences to Austin's diverse homes. What started as two AV enthusiasts in a garage now serves hundreds of Central Texas families annually.

We combine technical expertise with architectural sensitivity, whether installing in a Mueller modern build or retrofitting a Circle C ranch. Every system is calibrated for Austin's unique acoustics and climate challenges.

As Austin grows, we're committed to preserving local character. Our team volunteers with youth tech programs and sources materials from Texas suppliers whenever possible.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Summit Home Theater

Trusted home theater professionals serving Austin, TX and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
